stemHtml: A pilot is calculating the take-off speeds for a contaminated runway and chooses a “Wet V1”. Should he/she expect this “Wet V1” to be higher or lower compared to V1 for dry runway conditions?

options.a: Runway surface conditions have NO effect on the V1 calculation.
options.b: “Wet V1” would be higher for wet runway conditions.
options.c: “Wet V1” would be lower for wet runway conditions.
options.d: “Wet V<sub>1</sub>” would be equal to V<sub>2</sub>.
